# Natural Wood Art — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A handmade crafts brand specializing in the artful fusion of natural woods — olive and acacia — with epoxy resin to create functional and decorative pieces. The product line includes elegant natural cutting boards and large handcrafted mezuzahs, reflecting a blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern artisan aesthetics. The brand carries a warm, organic, and artisanal vibe with deep cultural and spiritual undertones, particularly through the Judaica elements like the mezuzah.

---

Whether used as a gift or a home upgrade, they symbolize luxury, roots, and creativity.

### Mezuzahs  olive wood and epoxy
https://nwooda.com/product/mezuzahs-olive-wood-and-epoxy-w6nea7
- Price: 79.00 USD (sale, was 90.00 USD)
- Availability: In stock
- Description: Mezuzahs that combine olive wood and epoxy (synthetic resin) are unique pieces of art that combine natural, raw materials with modern, luxurious design. This combination creates a "Natural Wood Art" look in which each mezuzah is one of a kind.
- Image: https://nwooda.com/assets/product-1776962615785-mitcv.webp

### olive wood cutting bord
https://nwooda.com/product/olive-wood-cutting-bord-nf3hg3
- Price: 250.00 USD (sale, was 320.00 USD)
- Availability: In stock
- Description: This cutting board is a high-end artisanal piece that blends the rustic, ancient beauty of natural olive wood with the sleek, modern aesthetic of liquid resin. Each board is a one-of-a-kind creation, as the resin follows the unique, organic contours of the specific wood slab used.
- Image: https://nwooda.com/assets/product-1776962310065-tjdltt.webp

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Natural Wood Art
A handmade crafts brand specializing in the artful fusion of natural woods — olive and acacia — with epoxy resin to create functional and decorative pieces. The product line includes elegant natural cutting boards and large handcrafted mezuzahs, reflecting a blend of traditional craftsmanship and modern artisan aesthetics. The brand carries a warm, organic, and artisanal vibe with deep cultural and spiritual undertones, particularly through the Judaica elements like the mezuzah.

## Services/Products
- Natural cutting boards made of olive wood or acacia wood combined with epoxy
- Large handmade mezuzahs made of olive wood and epoxy
- Various handmade wood and epoxy products

## Target Audience
- Artisanal Gift Shoppers
- Luxury Homeowners

## Industry
handmade crafts & woodworking

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://nwooda.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://nwooda.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://nwooda.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://nwooda.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://nwooda.com/product-feed.xml
